word: G3320 - μεσότοιχον - mesótoichon - mes-ot'-oy-khon - Middle wall

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μεσότοιχον

- Transliteration: mesotoichon

- Phonetic: mes-ot'-oy-khon

- Definition:

1. a partition wall

- Origin: from G3319 and G5109

- TDNT entry: 14:25,6

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G3319 and G5109; a partition (figuratively): - middle wall.
